subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! From ancient times hath Táliqán been a soil wherein flowers and fragrant herbs have blossomed forth, and a wellspring of the heart's mystic secrets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان طالقان از قدیم زمان منبت گل و ریاحین بود و محل انبعاث اسرار وجدان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @freedom of thought and action, @words vs deeds, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
